# Build-time constraints for Python 3.11 compatibility.
# Set via PIP_CONSTRAINT before any pip install so these limits apply
# even inside pip's isolated build environments (used when building
# packages from source).  Prevents meson-python >= 0.18 from being
# pulled in; 0.18+ requires Python >= 3.12 and will crash source builds
# on Python 3.11.
meson-python<0.18
